retrieved_result: Solutions Your design challenges involve much more than a point-tool solution. That's why Cadence works on solutions for your most challenging problems at a sub-system or system level. You can benefit from the work we've done by exploring the sections below.3D-IC Design Enabling maximum functionality in a sma
Decision_Reason: The result discusses Cadence EDA solutions and 3D-IC design, not software development IDEs.
